name: Billy Hicks Georgetown

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.
Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Restaurant-linked Toast catalog is the complete current menu surface; the 44 validated current product names and descriptions were reconciled here.
Official daily brunch PDF was inspected; it contains no allergen matrix and notes that not all ingredients are listed.
Official lunch PDF was inspected; it contains no allergen matrix and requests guests disclose allergies.
Official weekend brunch PDF was inspected; it contains no allergen matrix and requests guests disclose allergies.
Official homepage identifies Billy Hicks at 3277 M Street Northwest, Washington, DC 20007 and links to its current Toast ordering catalog.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: recompute Ingredient Intelligence after direct catalog finalization
